message:
test(fcp-crypto): metamorphic sign/verify proptests for Ed25519

Four new proptest cases (64 per relation) that lift the existing
single-case ad-hoc tests into the full (keypair × message) property
space:

  * M1 core identity — verify(sign(m, sk), pk, m) == Ok
  * M2 message mutation — flipping any byte in m makes verify fail
  * M3 cross-key replay — sig from sk_a cannot verify under pk_b
  * M5 determinism — Ed25519 / RFC 8032 signs are byte-deterministic
    across repeats of the same (sk, m); drift would indicate an
    RNG leak masquerading as a deterministic signature

M4 (signature mutation) is already covered by
signature_malleability_relation_rejects_s_plus_group_order above.
Numbering follows the /testing-metamorphic taxonomy; see the block
header comment in ed25519.rs for the full table.

Seed space: any [u8; 32] works as an Ed25519 SK (per
from_bytes' "any 32-byte seed yields a valid SK" contract), so
proptest generates uniformly from the full 2^256 keyspace. The M3
case uses prop_assume to discard the degenerate "seed_a == seed_b"
draw so the relation "distinct keypairs" is actually exercised.

Verified with
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-A cargo test \
    -p fcp-crypto --lib ed25519
→ 57 passed, 0 failed (includes the 4 new proptests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
